name: Small Chickens Marinated in Tequila and Lime
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove backbones from the chickens.
2. Flatten the chickens with the palm of your hand.
3. In a large bowl, combine lime juice, tequila, olive oil, Cointreau, and garlic. Stir until well mixed.
4. Add the chickens to the marinade and turn to coat evenly. Cover and marinate at room temperature for up to 2 hours, or overnight in the refrigerator.
5. Before cooking, return the chickens to room temperature.
6. Arrange the chickens, skin-side up, in a shallow baking pan. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Bake at 400°F on the upper rack of the oven, basting occasionally with marinade, until the skin is golden and juices from the thighs, when pierced at their thickest part, run pinkish-yellow, about 25 to 30 minutes.
Source: Chicago Sun Times, January 19, 1989
